title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.832 - Sam Santhuff memorial highway designated for a portion of State Highway F in city of Fulton
text:
227.832.  Sam Santhuff memorial highway designated for a portion of State Highway F in city of Fulton. — The portion of State Highway F from Gaylord Drive continuing east to Westminster Avenue in the city of Fulton in Callaway County shall be designated the "Sam Santhuff Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2023 S.B. 127)
